key.name: animation-time
key.description: Time in seconds for panel show/hide animations.

key.name: panel-color
key.description: Hex color string (#rrggbb) applied to the panel background.

key.name: panel-opacity-clear
key.description: Panel opacity (0.0–1.0) when no window overlaps the panel area.

key.name: panel-opacity-overlap
key.description: Panel opacity (0.0–1.0) when a window is behind the panel area.
